name: Bank Membership Card
description: Identifies you to any branch of the Bank of the Realm. Lets you deposit, withdraw, and redeem lockbox vouchers at any teller.

name: Bank Note (10 gold)
description: Issued by the Bank of the Realm. Redeem at any teller for 10 gold.

name: Cut Ruby
description: A valuable item suitable for safekeeping in a bank lockbox.

name: Lockbox Voucher: Cut Ruby
description: Hand this slip to any teller to retrieve the Cut Ruby you deposited.
